name: Shrimp-Gruyere Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 5 Ounces Shredded Gruyere, or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cracker crumbs and 1/4 cup melted butter; press mixture evenly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. Peel, devein, and chop shrimp. Cook shrimp, green pepper, red pepper, onion, and garlic in 3 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, for 4 to 5 minutes or until shrimp are done and veggies are tender. Drain well and set aside.
3. Beat cream cheese and mayonnaise at high speed until creamy; add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition. Gradually add milk, beating well at low speed just until blended. Stir in shrimp mixture, shredded Gruyere cheese,
